chatbot.title: Xyberosec Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi 👋 I'm your assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.fallback: I didn’t fully understand. Try one of these:

services.question: What are you looking for?
services.webDevelopmentReply: Great choice. We build fast, modern business websites.
services.uiuxReply: Perfect. Our design team can craft clean, conversion-focused UX.
services.cyberReply: Excellent. We can audit and strengthen your digital security posture.

courses.question: What kind of learning do you need?
courses.beginnerReply: We recommend our beginner-friendly tracks with practical projects.
courses.teamReply: Team training is available. We can tailor modules for your staff.

pricing.question: Would you like a quick estimate or a custom quote?
pricing.quoteReply: Great. Share your project scope and we will prepare a tailored quote.
pricing.compareReply: We offer flexible packages based on timeline and project complexity.

contact.question: How would you like to connect with us?
contact.bookReply: Perfect. We can schedule a quick discovery call this week.
contact.messageReply: Awesome. Use our contact page and we will respond shortly.

common.backMessage: Sure—going back to your previous step.
